## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] CI / build / tooling (`ci` / `build` / `chore`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor / style (`refactor` / `style`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows the naming convention (`feat/...`, `fix/...`, `ci/...`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass locally
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
